title: Binan koukou chikyuu boueibu Love! Love! Love!
original_title: 美男高校地球防衛部LOVE! LOVE! LOVE!
overview: The older boys are graduating school and recount their memories together. The next day everyone defends the graduation ceremony against Zundar and Dadacha's Second-Button Monster, but Yumoto struggles using his love power.
